description: CoComelon Cece plush — sewing and fabric repair.
itemDetails:
CoComelon Cece plush is licensed preschool character merchandise from the CoComelon brand expansion that surged globally in the late 2010s and 2020s. Official plush releases are commonly distributed through major toy channels under licensed agreements.

Typical materials are polyester plush fabric, embroidered facial features, and soft fill designed for toddler-safe handling.
